title: Feather to String
description: allows you to convert a feather to string
body:
A lot of mods need string for crafting. This mod allows you to make string out of feather. This mod will save some time for you and feathers are now not only used for arrows.

well a feather is just made from smaller strings so it is logical to be able to make 1 whole string from it.

you can use this mod in mod packs
